Module com.example.escriturarapida
Package com.example.escriturarapida.view

Class GameView

java.lang.Object
com.example.escriturarapida.view.GameView
public class GameView extends Object
View class for the Escritura Rapida game. Loads the FXML file and sets up the main stage.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameView(javafx.stage.Stage stage)
    Creates and displays the main game window.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameView

      public GameView(javafx.stage.Stage stage) throws IOException
      Creates and displays the main game window.
      Parameters:
      stage - the primary stage provided by JavaFX.
      Throws:
      IOException - if the FXML file cannot be loaded.
